name: Necromancer Aidenmir

sheet.name: Necromancer Aidenmir
sheet.background_story:
Aidenmir is a young and ambitious necromancer who seeks to gain immense power through a powerful ritual that requires several rare and exotic components found only in The Primordial Lands. He has hired Elizabeth and Taurus to protect him on this perilous journey.

Aidenmir is cautious and calculating, but also impulsive when it comes to achieving his goals. He is willing to take risks to see his plans come to fruition, but relies heavily on companions for their strength and expertise.

As they travel closer to The Primordial Lands, Aidenmir knows that the risks will only increase.
